response.justification: While the candidate has strong general software engineering experience and diverse technical skills, there is no evidence of professional C++ development on Windows, SQL Server/Oracle database work in capital markets, or any domain exposure to fixed income, investment banking, or capital markets — all of which are mandatory for this role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong track record in CI/CD, testing, and dev-ops infrastructure
Proven ability to deliver complex systems and contribute to open-source projects
concerns: No demonstrated professional C++ experience on Windows platform
Lack of any capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domain exposure
SQL experience listed but not tied to SQL Server or Oracle in financial systems context
